name: swiss-grocery-scraper
title: Swiss Grocery Scraper
description: Scrapes weekly product offers and prices from all five major Swiss grocery retailers (Aldi, Migros, Coop, Denner, Lidl) across Swiss regions. Uses Crawlee for web scraping and Docling for PDF prospekt extraction. Supports parallel scraping, region filtering, webhook notifications, and scheduled runs. Outputs structured product data including prices, discounts, categories, and validity dates.
